name: live2d-haxe
description: Live2D Cubism SDK for Haxe - GPU shader rendering with multi-backend abstraction (cpp + hl, OpenFL/Flixel/Heaps)
releasenote: v0.7.0: Heaps 1.9.1 backend support. New HeapsRenderer (IL2DRenderer impl) + L2DHeapsObject (h2d.Object wrapper) + CubismHeapsShader (mask + Multiply/Screen color + opacity via hxsl). HL target only. No breaking changes to existing OpenFL/Flixel backends.
